objective: To build a secure, basic personal finance tracker demonstrating core CRUD operations for transactions.

features.name: Manual Transaction Entry
features.description: Ability to manually input amount, date, description, and category.

features.name: Category Management
features.description: Predefined list of categories (Groceries, Bills, Income, etc.).

features.name: Basic Dashboard & Visualization
features.description: A main view showing total income vs. expenses for the current month, using a simple chart.

features.name: Simple Budgeting
features.description: Allow users to set a budget limit per category.

features.name: Data Filtering & Search
features.description: Filter transactions by date range or keyword.

features.name: Bank Synchronization
features.description: Integration with services like Plaid for automatic data import.

features.name: Advanced AI/Forecasting
features.description: Predictive modeling to warn users of budget overruns.

features.name: Expense Sharing
features.description: Functionality to split shared bills with other users.
